overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a rural countryside at golden hour. The character travels along dirt paths between wheat fields and stone walls, passes a wooden farmhouse, crosses a footbridge, and continues toward a distant windmill while encountering NPC villagers.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural path between stone walls and golden wheat fields

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the country path between stone walls and fields

notable_agents.action: villagers working near the stone wall in the wheat field

entered.detail: low stone wall running alongside the dirt path
small traditional hut with conical thatched roof
golden wheat crops behind wooden fencing
rustic wooden post fence bordering the field
tall wooden windmill visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a rural dirt path flanked by a stone wall on the left and golden wheat fields on the right. A small thatched hut sits in the distance while villagers work in the fields. The warm golden hour light illuminates the countryside scene.

events.description: approaching the large wooden farmhouse with painted decorations
passing the corner of the house, revealing the river ahead

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking past the wooden house, glancing at the folk art decorations on the walls

entered.detail: log cabin with painted folk art decorations and thatched roof

segments.scene_description: The path leads alongside a large wooden farmhouse adorned with colorful folk paintings. Geralt walks close to the building, passing its decorated walls as the stone walls and thatched hut recede behind. The river and a wooden bridge become visible in the distance ahead.

events.description: stepping onto the wooden footbridge over the water
exiting the bridge onto the dirt path on the far side

agents.ego_description: Geralt crossing the wooden bridge, looking out over the water

entered.detail: rustic wooden footbridge with railings spanning the waterway
calm waterway flowing beneath the bridge with reeds along the banks

segments.scene_description: Geralt crosses a narrow wooden footbridge over a calm river. The bridge planks creak as he walks, with water visible through the gaps. The farmhouse and wheat fields fall behind as he reaches the far bank and steps back onto dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside path with windmill in distance

events.description: encountering groups of villagers walking along the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the path, passing villagers traveling in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: villager in a dress walking opposite direction along the path
villager walking ahead on the path carrying items

segments.scene_description: The path opens into broader countryside with the windmill now prominently visible ahead. Geralt passes several villagers walking in the opposite direction along the trail. The wooden bridge and river recede behind as the terrain becomes more open with scattered trees and wooden fences.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rural countryside that transitions from enclosed wheat fields to an open landscape featuring a distant windmill. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path flanked by a stone wall and golden wheat fields, with a small thatched hut and working villagers visible under the warm glow of golden hour. As the path progresses, the scene shifts toward a large wooden farmhouse adorned with colorful folk paintings, passing its decorated walls as the initial fields recede. The camera then follows Geralt across a narrow wooden footbridge over a calm river, leaving the farmhouse behind as he steps back onto the dirt trail on the far bank. Finally, the terrain opens into a broader expanse of scattered trees and wooden fences, passing oncoming villagers as the path leads directly toward a prominent windmill.
